The '''''Blaze of Glory''''' was a modified [[YT-1930 transport/Legends|YT-1930]] [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighter]] owned and operated by the [[Bimm/Legends|Bimm]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] [[Rycar Ryjerd/Legends|Rycar Ryjerd]]. The ''Blaze of Glory'' was at one time docked in Rycar's hidden [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] base in the [[Obana Belt]].

{{Ship-stub}}
